mano_cua.result_summary: typehero项目除首页外所有页面报Server Error: GITHUB_ID环境变量未配置导致NextAuth失败，explore/challenge/submissions等页面全部500错误，无法到达测试目标功能。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All pages except homepage show Server Error due to missing GITHUB_ID env variable. NextAuth configuration requires GitHub OAuth credentials which are not available in local deployment.
